summary: Full visual regression re-test after E1's global #0D0D0D→#00F2FF fix. All critical invisible-text buttons confirmed FIXED via code inspection + browser automation. Screenshots taken of all 6 tabs. All major issues from iteration_15 resolved.

ui_bugs.component: DNA tab — TalentCard 'Glory Shot' OVR badge
ui_bugs.issue: NaN shown in OVR badge (pre-existing calculation bug, not related to this sprint's changes)
bio$.progressFill backgroundColor: '#0D0D0D' — dark fill on translucent cyan track. Main agent confirmed this is intentional. May appear invisible on web but is preserved by design.

issues: Locked eligibility text color rgba(255,255,255,0.3) is 30% opacity — borderline readable. Intentional 'locked/unavailable' visual treatment. Message: 'PROSSIMA EVOLUZIONE TRA: 30 GIORNI'

login_accedi_button.verified_by: Browser automation computed style: rgb(0, 242, 255) background

arena_kotd_avatar.verified_by: Browser automation: Text node color rgb(0, 242, 255) on bg rgb(26,26,46) #1A1A2E

dna_stat_fills.verified_by: Browser automation: fill bars show rgb(0, 242, 255) CYAN fills at correct widths

tabs_visual_verification.login: ACCEDI button CYAN (rgb(0,242,255)), text dark readable. PASS
tabs_visual_verification.arena: KOTD avatar 'T' CYAN letter on #1A1A2E bg. Section labels readable. Stats row visible. SFIDA buttons GOLD. ELITE ACTIVITY feed readable. PASS
tabs_visual_verification.kore: Passport card with CYAN top glow line, LVL badge visible, FOUNDER badge visible, City ranking readable. PASS
tabs_visual_verification.nexus: 4 console cards all readable (gold titles + cyan subtitles). AZIONI PROATTIVE carousel visible with CERTIFICA IL DNA and RISCATTA REWARD cards. PASS
tabs_visual_verification.dna: CYAN stat fills confirmed via DOM (rgb(0,242,255)). Radar chart visible. PASS
tabs_visual_verification.rank: Hall of Fame loads correctly. Rank #1 S (STEFANO/FOUNDER), #2 T (THUNDER_MAN), #3 M (MAYA_J) all visible. Gold/silver/bronze medals. PASS
tabs_visual_verification.onboarding_step1: INIZIA CALIBRAZIONE button GOLD (initial state, correct). ctaActivated confirmed CYAN in code for NEXUS-triggered state. PASS

action_items: LOW: DNA NaN OVR badge in TalentCard — pre-existing calculation bug
INFO: bio$.progressFill backgroundColor #0D0D0D intentionally preserved per problem statement — may want to reconsider for web visibility
critical_code_review_comments: Global fix confirmed: all former '#0D0D0D' button backgrounds changed to '#00F2FF' for CTA buttons. Only intentional decorative darks (laserLine, scanLayer, talosBottomLine, progressFill in bio scan) preserved as per agent instructions.
All elements with color:'#050505' (dark text) now properly paired with bright backgrounds (#00F2FF cyan or #D4AF37 gold) — no more invisible text pattern.
ARENA KOTD avatar: changed from backgroundColor:'#0D0D0D'+color:'#050505' to backgroundColor:'#1A1A2E'+color:'#00F2FF' — fully readable CYAN letter on dark navy bg.

success_rate.frontend: 97% — All 9 critical fixes verified. Only 1 pre-existing NaN bug and 1 intentional dark remain.

seed_data_creation: None — used existing test account ogrisek.stefano@gmail.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: All critical invisible-text bugs from iteration_15 are fixed. Both the global color fix (#0D0D0D→#00F2FF for CTAs) and the beatInstruction font-size reduction (48→32px) are confirmed. Pre-existing issues: (1) DNA NaN OVR in TalentCard, (2) bio scan progress fill dark on dark track (intentional). App is in stable state.

rca_of_issue.root_cause: Previous sprint incorrectly changed all rgba transparent backgrounds to #0D0D0D (near-black), including CTA buttons that previously had bright cyan (#00F2FF) backgrounds. This made dark text (#050505) invisible against near-black backgrounds.
rca_of_issue.resolution: Global fix applied: all backgroundColor:'#0D0D0D' that were formerly bright cyan CTAs reverted to '#00F2FF'. Intentional darks (laserLine, scanLayer, talosBottomLine, bio progressFill) preserved.
rca_of_issue.verification: 9 specific fixes confirmed via code inspection + browser automation computed style queries.
